title: Revisions to Death
wikitext:
[]: Revisions to Death             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 10:30 am I'm wondering if there is a list somewhere of the revisions between Death, Death (true), and Death (true^2)? Somewhere it was stated on this board that the Mangle release was Death (true) (I had always thought that it was Death, but then again, I thought what they had on the disc claiming to be Rebirth actually was Rebirth.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Oct 12, 2006 11:19 am The Newtype Filmbook for D&R is based on the original version of Death, thus includes the NPC sequences that were subsequently edited out in Death (True) and (True^2) The most significant difference is that all the new Mind Rape scenes from #22', and Asuka's "Who wants to breath the same air as Shinji and Misato..." speech, were taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 11:25 am The cut of Misato that flashes by during Kensuke's chat with Shinji (from #04) was also redone by the time TRUE(^2) came around. (Incidentally, the cut was a retake of a cut from #04 in the first place.) Without having actual video of the first two versions of DEATH, tho, a full list of changes is impossible. Maybe I can try doing a sweep of Jap fan sites sometime.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:16 pm Manga Entertainment actually got the ultimate version; Death True Two.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:31 pm Huh, and here I've been further pissed at them for giving us Death instead of Death (true^2). I was wrong. But now I can be pissed at them for giving us the first 30 minutes of EoE, instead and claiming it was Rebirth.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:40 pm I've heard that it was actually Gainax that handed "ReAir" over to them. Makes sense, considering that Rebirth is something whose existence they basically want to obliterate. Too bad Manga was too ignorant to realize what they'd been given.

[]: Re: Revisions to Death             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 16, 2006 7:50 pm cat42 wrote: I'm wondering if there is a list somewhere of the revisions between Death, Death (true), and Death (true^2)? Somewhere it was stated on this board that the Mangle release was Death (true) (I had always thought that it was Death, but then again, I thought what they had on the disc claiming to be Rebirth actually was Rebirth.)

[]: Revisions to Death             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 10:30 am I'm wondering if there is a list somewhere of the revisions between Death, Death (true), and Death (true^2)? Somewhere it was stated on this board that the Mangle release was Death (true) (I had always thought that it was Death, but then again, I thought what they had on the disc claiming to be Rebirth actually was Rebirth.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Oct 12, 2006 11:19 am The Newtype Filmbook for D&R is based on the original version of Death, thus includes the NPC sequences that were subsequently edited out in Death (True) and (True^2) The most significant difference is that all the new Mind Rape scenes from #22', and Asuka's "Who wants to breath the same air as Shinji and Misato..." speech, were taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 11:25 am The cut of Misato that flashes by during Kensuke's chat with Shinji (from #04) was also redone by the time TRUE(^2) came around. (Incidentally, the cut was a retake of a cut from #04 in the first place.) Without having actual video of the first two versions of DEATH, tho, a full list of changes is impossible. Maybe I can try doing a sweep of Jap fan sites sometime.
